subcodes.first_line: There hath appeared before the Throne the letter of one of Mine Afnán, who hath drawn from the Lamp of Utterance and attained unto true knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر لدی العرش کتاب احد من افنانی الذی اقتبس من مشکوه البیان و فاز بالعرفان
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
